title: Financial Account Schema
description: Schema for validating individual financial statement accounts across IFRS, K-IFRS (DART), and US GAAP

id.description: Global unique identifier. Format: {STATEMENT}_{CATEGORY}_{ACCOUNT}. Stable — never changes once assigned.

korean_name.description: Korean account name as used in K-IFRS / DART filings

english_name.description: English account name as used in IFRS / US GAAP filings

name.description: Display name (defaults to korean_name for Korean contexts)

statement.description: Which financial statement(s) this account appears in

sign.description: positive: always >= 0. negative: always <= 0. natural: sign follows accounting convention

parent.description: Parent account ID for hierarchical rollup

children.description: Child account IDs for hierarchical rollup

depends_on.description: Account IDs that this account depends on for calculation (upstream)

affects.description: Ratios or derived metrics that this account feeds into (downstream)

ratios.description: Financial ratios that use this account as an input

aliases.description: Alternative names used in different reporting standards or languages

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and grouping

formula.description: Formula for calculated accounts (e.g. 'BS_CA_TOTAL - BS_CA_INV - BS_CA_PREPAID')
